commands.author: clawsweeper[bot]
commands.repair_reason: A narrow PR-branch repair can redact agentEventSink.url in sink logs without deciding the larger product question.; Needs attention: The diff introduces a concrete logging risk because the new webhook sink can expose URL-embedded credentials or tokens in gateway logs.; Review finding: [P2] Redact the sink URL before logging it — src/infra/agent-event-sink.ts:95-96 (sha=d753ee704d1af26cfe3f2bc8c0fa79c64d144253)
commands.review_summary:
The PR adds a top-level `agentEventSink` config and core AgentEventStream webhook sink for thinking/reply events, wires gateway startup/shutdown, updates config/SDK baselines and Telegram docs, and removes the stale Telegram-specific changelog entry.

Reproducibility: yes. for the review finding: the leak path is source-reproducible from PR head because `agentEventSink.url` accepts HTTPS URLs and the sink logs `config.url` directly. Reproduction is not applicable to the feature request itself because this is a new user-facing runtime/config capability.
commands.review_followup: A narrow PR-branch repair can redact `agentEventSink.url` in sink logs without deciding the larger product question.

target.title: feat(core): channel-agnostic agent event sink for thinking + reply streaming
target.author: anagnorisis2peripeteia
